diagnostic_steps: Read freeze-frame and DTC status
Check battery temperature and cooling logs
Check cell voltages and delta
If data is insufficient: ask for SOC, ambient temp, and conditions
Version note: applies to firmware v1.0.x (model_year 2022)
Read freeze-frame and DTC status
Check battery temperature and cooling logs
Check cell voltages and delta
If data is insufficient: ask for SOC, ambient temp, and conditions
Version note: applies to firmware v1.1.x (model_year 2023)

Check cell voltages and delta

Read freeze-frame and DTC status
Check battery temperature and cooling logs
Check cell voltages and delta
If data is insufficient: ask for SOC, ambient temp, and conditions
Version note: applies to firmware v1.4.x (model_year 2024)
Confirm charger type (AC/DC) and port status
Check BMS logs and firmware version
Try different charger/cable to exclude external causes
If intermittent: ask for time, frequency, and environment details
Version note: applies to firmware v1.0.x (model_year 2022)

If intermittent: ask for time, frequency, and environment details

Version note: applies to firmware v1.3.x (model_year 2024)
Confirm charger type (AC/DC) and port status
Check BMS logs and firmware version
Try different charger/cable to exclude external causes
If intermittent: ask for time, frequency, and environment details
Version note: applies to firmware v1.4.x (model_year 2024)
Check inverter temperature and coolant flow
Read live data (current/voltage) during acceleration
Inspect connectors and harness
If multiple DTCs appear: record full DTC list and conditions
Version note: applies to firmware v1.0.x (model_year 2022)

Run fan actuator test in service mode
Check relay/fuse and fan current draw
Verify firmware recommendations for thermal control
If no operating data: ask customer about fan noise/behavior
